name: Passover Cheese Blintzes
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------FILLING--------------------------
1 lb Dry cottage cheese
1 tablespoon Thick cream
1/2 teaspoon Salt
1 Egg
1/2 teaspoon Sugar
To make the batter, alternately add salt, a little of the cake meal and water to the beaten eggs, mixing thoroughly. Pour into a small hot greased frying pan only enough batter to make a very thin pancake, tipping the pan from side to side. Remove with a towel, fried side up. Make several sheets this way. Place a heaping tablespoon of cheese mixture on each sheet, fold sides of sheet over mixture to form an envelope, and fry again on both sides until brown.
To make filling: Press cheese through a sieve, then add the remaining ingredients and beat until smooth.
